name: example-acreage-farming
title: Acreage — Precision Farming
description: Premium precision-farming landing page: dark/light alternating sections, a fullscreen hero video background, an animated stats grid, an infinite logo marquee, and image-backed service cards.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 高端精准农业落地页：明暗交替分区、全屏 hero 视频背景、动态数据网格、无限滚动 logo 跑马灯，以及图片背景的服务卡片。
description_i18n.en: Premium precision-farming landing page: dark/light alternating sections, a fullscreen hero video background, an animated stats grid, an infinite logo marquee, and image-backed service cards.

query.en:
Build a premium **precision-farming (agritech) landing page** called **Acreage** in **React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind**, with **dark/light alternating sections**, a **fullscreen hero video background**, an **animated stats grid**, an **infinite logo marquee**, and **image-backed service cards**. A complete, self-contained single-file reference implementation ships beside this plugin at example.html — match its tokens, section order, reveal animation, marquee, hover behavior, and responsive breakpoints exactly. Start from example.html and only swap copy/data; do not rewrite the design.

**Fonts:** load from Google Fonts — **Manrope** (400/500/600/700/800) for UI and body, **Instrument Serif** (regular + italic) for the editorial accent word in the hero headline. Manrope is the default; Instrument Serif italic is used only for one or two emphasized words.

**Icons & logos (critical):** every icon and partner logo is **inline SVG** — the brand wheat/sprout mark, stat icons, service arrows, and the marquee leaf. There are NO avatar images in this template. Do NOT introduce `i.pravatar.cc`, `api.dicebear.com`, or any remote avatar host; they 403 in the preview sandbox.

## CSS Variables (`:root`) — locked

```
--bg-dark: #0d120e;       --bg-darker: #080b09;
--bg-light: #f3f0e7;      --bg-cream: #e9e4d6;
--green: #6b8e3a;         --green-bright: #9ec94a;   --green-deep: #2e3b22;
--soil: #c9a06a;
--text-light: #f3f0e7;    --text-muted-light: rgba(243,240,231,0.6);
--text-dark: #1a1f17;     --text-muted-dark: rgba(26,31,23,0.55);
--radius: 28px;           --radius-lg: 40px;
--ease: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
--transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
```

Body: Manrope, `background: var(--bg-dark)`, `color: var(--text-light)`, `overflow-x: hidden`, `html { scroll-behavior: smooth }`. The page is **dark by default**; only the stats section flips to the light/cream palette. Content max-width 1240px (`.wrap`, padding `0 32px`).

## Sections (in order)

### 1. Nav (fixed, shrinks on scroll)
Transparent at top (max-width 1240px, padding `22px 32px`). After `scrollY > 40` add `.scrolled`: float inward (`top:14px; left:16px; right:16px`), `rgba(8,11,9,0.72)` bg + `backdrop-filter: blur(14px)`, 1px `rgba(243,240,231,0.08)` border, `border-radius:100px`. Left: brand = a 30px gradient mark (`linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-bright), var(--green))`) with an inline wheat/sprout SVG + "Acreage" (weight 800). Center: links Platform / Data / Services / Pricing (hidden ≤980px). Right: green-bright pill CTA "Book a demo".

### 2. Hero (fullscreen, video background)
`min-height:100vh`, content bottom-aligned. A `<video autoplay muted loop playsinline>` fills `inset:0` with `object-fit:cover` and a poster still; a gradient `::after` (top transparent → bottom `rgba(8,11,9,0.92)`) keeps text legible. Headline `clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6.5rem)`, weight 800, `letter-spacing:-0.03em`, with one word in Instrument Serif italic — e.g. "Grow more from *every* acre.". Muted sub-paragraph about unifying satellite imagery, soil sensors, and autonomous machinery. Actions: green-bright primary "Start free trial" + ghost outline "Watch the film" (with a play-triangle SVG). Below: a hero-meta row of three big stats — `2.4M+ Acres monitored`, `31% Avg. yield lift`, `−40% Water per harvest`.
- Hero video (large stable CDN — keep remote): `https://plugin-assets.open-design.ai/plugins/aerocore/23211-720-e83442.mp4`. Poster: an Unsplash aerial-field still (remote URL OK).

### 3. Logo marquee
Full-width band on `--bg-darker` with top+bottom hairline borders. Centered uppercase label ("Trusted by growers, co-ops and agronomists worldwide"), then an **infinite horizontal marquee**: a `.marquee-track` of duplicated partner logos animated `translateX(0 → -50%)` over `32s linear infinite`, paused on hover, edge-masked with a `linear-gradient` CSS mask. Build the track in JS by duplicating an 8-name partner array (AgriGrid, TerraSeed, Verdant, SoilSense, Harvestly, FieldOps, GreenRow, Cropwise), each as an inline leaf SVG + name. No remote logo images.

### 4. Stats (light section)
`.section-light` flips to the cream palette (`--bg-light` bg, `--text-dark` text, green eyebrow). Header row: eyebrow + big `h2` ("Field intelligence that compounds every season.") on the left, descriptive paragraph on the right. Then a **4-column stat grid** (`repeat(4,1fr)`, gap 20px). Each `.stat-card` is white, rounded `--radius`, min-height 220px, with a 46px icon chip at top, a big `stat-num` (`3rem`, weight 800, with a smaller `.unit` span for %/k) pushed to the bottom via `margin-top:auto`, and a label. **The first card has `.accent`** → `--green-deep` background, light text, tinted icon chip. Hover lifts cards `translateY(-6px)` with a soft shadow. Icons inline SVG (refresh-cycle, trend-up, droplet, clock). Values: `98%` imagery coverage, `31%` median yield increase, `40%` less irrigation water, `11k` autonomous field-hours.

### 5. Services (dark, image cards)
Back to `--bg-dark`. Centered head (eyebrow + h2 "One platform for the whole crop cycle." + paragraph). **3-column grid** of `.svc-card`, each `min-height:420px`, `--radius-lg`, an absolutely-positioned `.svc-bg` image that scales `1.06` on hover over `0.8s`, a bottom gradient scrim `::after`, and bottom-aligned body: a green-tinted `.svc-tag` chip, `h3`, paragraph, and a green-bright arrow link. Three cards: **Sensing** — satellite & drone scouting; **Deciding** — variable-rate prescriptions; **Acting** — autonomous machinery. Card background images are Unsplash farm stills (remote URLs OK — large stable CDN).

### 6. CTA
Band on `--bg-darker` containing a rounded-48px panel with a `linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-deep), #1c2616)` fill, a green radial glow `::before`, eyebrow, a huge headline ("Put your fields on autopilot."), one line of copy, and a green-bright primary button "Book a demo".

### 7. Footer
`--bg-darker`, top hairline. Left: brand mark + one-line mission. Right: three link columns (Platform / Company / Resources). Bottom bar: copyright + legal links separated by a hairline.

## Animations

- **Reveal:** every `.reveal` element starts `opacity:0; translateY(34px)` and transitions to visible over `0.9s var(--ease)` when it enters the viewport — one `IntersectionObserver` (`threshold:0.15`, `rootMargin:'0px 0px -8% 0px'`, unobserve after firing), with a stagger via `transitionDelay = (index % 4) * 0.07s`. In React this is Framer-Motion `whileInView` + `viewport={{ once: true }}`.
- **Nav shrink:** passive `scroll` listener toggles `.scrolled` at `scrollY > 40` (React: `useScroll`).
- **Marquee:** `@keyframes scroll-x { translateX(0) → translateX(-50%) }`, `32s linear infinite`, paused on `:hover`.
- **Hover:** buttons lift `translateY(-2/-3px)` with a green glow shadow; stat-cards and svc-cards lift `translateY(-6px)`; service background images scale `1.06`.
- All interactive transitions use `--transition` (`0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)`).

## Assets / hosts

- **Inline:** all icons and partner logos are inline SVG; there are no avatar images.
- **Keep remote (large stable CDN):** the hero `.mp4` on `cdn.coverr.co`, plus the Unsplash hero poster + service-card stills on `images.unsplash.com`.
- **Never** add a remote avatar host.

## Responsive

- ≤980px: stats grid → 2 columns, services grid → 1 column, nav-links hidden.
- ≤620px: `.wrap` padding `0 20px`, stats grid → 1 column, tighter hero-meta gap, CTA panel padding reduced.

## Color Rules — hard

Earthy agritech palette only: deep greens (`--green`, `--green-bright #9ec94a`, `--green-deep`), near-black greens (`--bg-dark #0d120e`, `--bg-darker #080b09`), warm cream/off-white (`--bg-light #f3f0e7`, `--bg-cream`), and a soil tan accent (`--soil #c9a06a`). **`--green-bright #9ec94a` is the locked accent — do not substitute blue/teal/purple.** Light text on dark, dark text on cream; all contrast-safe.
query.zh-CN: 构建高端精准农业（agritech）落地页 Acreage：明暗交替分区、全屏 hero 视频背景、动态数据网格、无限 logo 跑马灯、图片背景服务卡片。完整规格以 en 字段为准（含锁定的 CSS 变量、分区布局、动画与响应式断点）；请从随插件附带的 example.html 开始，仅替换文案与数据，不要重写设计。
